Tests the behavior of the `delete` operator on the `arguments` object in JavaScript.

# Purpose

The statement checks if deleting `arguments` returns `true`, which is a way to verify the compliance of the JavaScript engine with the ECMAScript specification regarding the `delete` operator. This is a narrow functionality test, focusing specifically on the behavior of the `delete` operation in a specific context.
